subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the servant of the Primal Point, His soul and His Beloved, unto those whose hearts God hath emptied [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدن عبد نقطه الاولی و نفسه و محبوبه الی الذین فرغ الله افئدتهم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @living waters; water of life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
